description_long: This is a countertop electric mixer with a bold, glossy red exterior and a robust, enclosed body. The main chassis is rectangular with rounded edges, supporting a large metallic mixing bowl that is partially covered by a gray plastic rim. A black power cord with a two-prong plug extends from the base, indicating its electric operation. The front features a control knob and a subtle brand logo, while the back has a vented panel for cooling. The mixer’s bowl is centrally positioned and appears detachable, with a visible mixing attachment inside. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for kitchen or utility room use.
description: A glossy red electric countertop mixer with a metallic bowl, control knob, and power cord. The design is modern, with a robust enclosed body and visible brand logo.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red chassis, metallic bowl, control knob, brand logo, and power cord.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the smooth, rounded back and vented cooling panel, with the power cord visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bowl and chassis, with less detail on controls or branding.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the open bowl and mixing attachment, with the power cord trailing to the side.
attribute_brand_logo: The word 'CHEFTRONIC' is visible in white on the side of the chassis.
attribute_control_panel_type: Single analog rotary knob on the lower right front side.
attribute_chassis_design: enclosed body with rounded edges and a solid base, modern and streamlined.
